concerns.detail: Discloses full name of a private individual (Wang Yu) along with specific institutional affiliations (former student at Peking University, currently at University of Wisconsin), which is personally identifying information about a student

Contains unsupported personal insults and character attacks ('疯狂舔...给他当走狗' / crazily sucking up to him, being his running dog/lackey) directed at a named student, rather than criticism of concrete advising practices
